# Peer To Peer Networking

> ENet-based multiplayer networking

**Category:** Integration · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** integration · godot

## What this does

ENet-based multiplayer networking

Specifies 5 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## What must be true

- **implementation:** Feature implemented in C++ engine core
- **platform_agnostic:** Works across desktop, web, mobile platforms

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Server Creation** — when Host a game server is requested, then Host a game server completed.
- **Client Connection** — when Connect to remote host is requested, then Connect to remote host completed.
- **Packet Sending** — when Send data to peers is requested, then Send data to peers completed.
- **Packet Receiving** — when Receive messages is requested, then Receive messages completed.
- **Reliable/unreliable** — when Choose delivery guarantees is requested, then Choose delivery guarantees completed.
